faqs.question: How do I RSVP or change my response?
faqs.answer: Use the RSVP page with the code from your invitation. You can return with the same link anytime to update your details before the wedding.

faqs.question: I lost my invitation code — what should I do?
faqs.answer: Please contact us using the details on the wedding details page and we’ll help you out.

faqs.question: Can I bring a plus-one or children?
faqs.answer: Your invitation lists who is invited. If you’re unsure, please reach out — we’d love to clarify.

faqs.question: Do you have a gift registry?
faqs.answer: You can contribute to our future together by making a cash donation towards our home.

faqs.question: Can I take photos during the ceremony?
faqs.answer: Sure, please feel free to take as many photos as you like!

faqs.question: How do I share dietary requirements?
faqs.answer: You can note dietary needs when you RSVP. If anything changes or you need to tell us more, contact us via the details page.
